botcomponent.description: Replace (reissue) a member's BlastPass card when it is lost, stolen, or damaged. Use whenever the person wants a new/replacement BlastPass card. The skill verifies identity (name + last 4 of the console serial) before deactivating the old card, mints a new one with reissue_card, and hands over a digital card. Do not use this to cancel a membership.
botcomponent.name: card-reissue
